trace.workflow_name: Detailed billing escalation and recovery workflow

metadata.purpose: Large integration fixture for Luna judging, cost analysis, redaction, loop detection, and final-error reporting.

output.note: PII detection intentionally deferred for this test trace.

input.content: Route support requests to the least-privileged workflow. Return strict JSON.
Customer maya.chen@example.com reports duplicate annual-plan charges and needs a refund.

output.content: {"queue":"billing","priority":"urgent","tools":["lookup_subscription","create_refund_case"]}

input.content: You are a billing escalation agent. Summarize evidence, select one safe next action, and do not expose customer data.
Ticket SUP-8421: duplicate annual renewal. Use only supplied account facts. Step 1 of the escalation workflow.

output.content: {"step":1,"decision":"collect_evidence","rationale":"Duplicate renewal is eligible for refund; gateway has not confirmed a case.","next_tool":"audit_billing_event"}
